Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT HON AU'S Motion For Order Dismissing Plaintiff's Complaint For Failure To Obey This Court's Prior Order is Granted. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HON AU's Motion To Compel Verified Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One; Verified Request For Production Of Documents And To Appear For Deposition.

No opposition filed. The defendant's motion is granted as follows. Plaintiff to respond to discovery within fifteen days of service of notice of the order granting this motion, and the notice of the order shall be accompanied by copies of the discovery at issue.

A Proposed order was submitted by the party directly to the Judge Pro Tem for signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
